testcase.name: [It] Workload cluster creation Creates a HA cluster with 3 control plane nodes

failure.message: Timed out after 600.001s. Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist. Expected 2 to equal 3

testcase.failure: [FAILED] Timed out after 600.001s. Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist Expected <int>: 2 to equal <int>: 3

testcase.name: [It] Workload cluster creation Deletes the cluster cleanly
